_comment: Curated MCP server templates. install.sh reads this to print per-server config guidance (required env vars + where to get them). Opt-in only: install.sh NEVER writes secrets and NEVER auto-installs a server. Copy the template into a project .mcp.json or ~/.claude.json yourself.

context7.note: Live library docs. No key required.

playwright.note: Browser automation. No key required. First run downloads browsers.

env.GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN: GitHub PAT — create at https://github.com/settings/tokens (repo scope). Or reuse `gh auth token`.
